title: Refactor unittest for change in history API
body:
* test_images.TestImages.test_history changed to allow
  '<missing>' as legal image ID.  Previously all layers
  used the image ID.  Now layer 0 reports '<missing>'.

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM.
I think the last test is OK, but could  be dropped.  I'd lean towards leaving it, especially if you get all green test buttons.
Will merge once Travis is green

:pushpin: Commit 54aa97a has been approved by `jwhonce`
